{
  "cells": [
    {
      "cell_type": "markdown",
      "metadata": {},
      "source": [
        "\n",
        "# SCM Usage\n",
        "\n",
        "This is a simple example of how to use the Synthetic Control Method to estimate the causal effect using the well known Kansas dataset.\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 2,
      "metadata": {
        "collapsed": false
      },
      "outputs": [],
      "source": [
        "from panel_exp.panel_data import long_df_to_paneldataset\n",
        "from panel_exp.methods.scm import SyntheticControl\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "long_df = pd.read_csv('kansas_parsed.csv')\n",
        "panel_data = long_df_to_paneldataset(long_df, \"year_qtr\", \"state\", \"lngdp\", [\"Kansas\"], 2012)\n",
        "\n",
        "scm = SyntheticControl()\n",
        "scm.run_analysis(panel_data)\n"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": 3,
      "metadata": {},
      "outputs": [
        {
          "data": {
            "image/png": "",
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 1500x1200 with 3 Axes>"
            ]
          },
          "metadata": {},
          "output_type": "display_data"
        }
      ],
      "source": [
        "scm.plot()"
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "execution_count": null,
      "metadata": {},
      "outputs": [],
      "source": []
    }
  ],
